value.description: Raw hides and skins of bovine (including buffalo) or equine animals (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment-dressed or further prepared), whether or not dehaired or split:
value.descriptionEn: Raw hides and skins of bovine (including buffalo) or equine animals (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment-dressed or further prepared), whether or not dehaired or split:
value.descriptionZh: 生皮及皮张 of 牛科 (包括 buffalo) or equine 动物 (鲜的，or salted，干制，limed，pickled or 另有保藏，but not tanned，parchment-dressed or further 已配制)，无论是否 dehaired or split：

value.description: Whole hides and skins, unsplit, of a weight per skin not exceeding 8 kg when simply dried, 10 kg when dry-salted, or 16 kg when fresh, wet-salted or otherwise preserved:
value.descriptionEn: Whole hides and skins, unsplit, of a weight per skin not exceeding 8 kg when simply dried, 10 kg when dry-salted, or 16 kg when fresh, wet-salted or otherwise preserved:
value.descriptionZh: Whole 皮张及皮，unsplit，一种重量每 skin 不超过 8 千克 when simply 干制，10 千克 when dry-salted，or 16 千克 when 鲜的，wet-salted or 另有保藏：
Of 牛科动物 (包括 buffalo)：

value.description: Of a unit surface area not exceeding 28 square feet (2.6 m2):
value.descriptionEn: Of a unit surface area not exceeding 28 square feet (2.6 m2):
value.descriptionZh: 一种 unit 表面 area 不超过 28 square feet (2.6 m2)：

value.descriptionEn: Whole hides and skins, of a weight exceeding 16 kg:
value.descriptionZh: Whole 皮张及皮，一种重量超过 16 千克：
Of 牛科动物 (包括 buffalo)：

value.description: Of a unit surface area not exceeding 28 square feet (2.6 m2):
value.descriptionEn: Of a unit surface area not exceeding 28 square feet (2.6 m2):
value.descriptionZh: 一种 unit 表面 area 不超过 28 square feet (2.6 m2)：

value.description: Other, including butts, bends and bellies:
value.descriptionEn: Other, including butts, bends and bellies:
value.descriptionZh: 其他，包括 butts，bends 及 bellies：
Of 牛科动物 (包括 buffalo)：

value.description: Raw skins of sheep or lambs (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment- dressed or further prepared), whether or not with wool on or split, other than those excluded by note 1(c) to this chapter:
value.descriptionEn: Raw skins of sheep or lambs (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment- dressed or further prepared), whether or not with wool on or split, other than those excluded by note 1(c) to this chapter:
value.descriptionZh: Raw 皮 of 绵羊 or lambs (鲜的，or salted，干制，limed，pickled or 另有保藏，but not tanned，parchment- dressed or further 已配制)，无论是否 with 羊毛 on or split，除...以外这些 excluded by 注释 1(c) 本章：
Hair 绵羊及 cabretta 皮

value.description: Other raw hides and skins (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment-dressed or further prepared), whether or not dehaired or split, other than those excluded by note 1(b) or 1(c) to this chapter:
value.descriptionEn: Other raw hides and skins (fresh, or salted, dried, limed, pickled or otherwise preserved, but not tanned, parchment-dressed or further prepared), whether or not dehaired or split, other than those excluded by note 1(b) or 1(c) to this chapter:
value.descriptionZh: 其他生皮及皮张 (鲜的，or salted，干制，limed，pickled or 另有保藏，but not tanned，parchment-dressed or further 已配制)，无论是否 dehaired or split，除...以外这些 excluded by 注释 1(b) or 1(c) 本章：
